name: NEXTNRG, INC.
summary: PART I Overview NextNRG: Powering Whats Next NextNRG is Powering Whats Next by implementing artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) into renewable energy, next-generation energy infrastructure, battery storage, wireless electric vehicle (EV) charging and on-demand mobile fuel delivery to create an integrated ecosystem.
